name: Email Organizer — Gmail Fetch + AI Categorization to Slack
description: Fetches recent emails from Gmail inbox, uses Claude AI to categorize each with smart labels (urgent, follow-up, FYI, etc.), and posts an organized digest to Slack.

source.originalName: Intelligent email organization with AI-powered content classification for Gmail

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the email digest

maxEmails.description: Maximum number of emails to fetch and categorize

steps.name: Build AI prompt for email categorization
Run Claude AI to categorize emails
Parse AI response and strip fences
Build Slack Block Kit email digest
